markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff the Airbyte account management to Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Joe is the content engine.** Joe Sovar is already managing content production, consistently delivering high-quality output a week ahead of schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [**Airtable manages a complex scope.** The Airtable OS uses a custom "effort value" system to balance the 25–100 piece/week contract, as 100 pieces is unmanageable.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [**A critical Webflow bug blocks automation.** The auto-publish pipeline breaks code snippets in articles, forcing manual publishing and blocking the rollout of TLDRs to \~600 pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [**Reporting focuses on new initiatives.** Weekly reports highlight performance of the latest content (e.g., industry pages), sessions, and LLM traffic (notably, a recent surge from Claude).](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Airtable OS

  - [**Production Status:** Joe Sovar manages all content creation, consistently delivering high-quality output a week ahead of schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
  - [**Contract Scope:** The 25–100 pieces/week contract is managed via a custom "effort value" system in Airtable, as 100 pieces is unmanageable for manual review.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [**Effort Value System:** Assigns a numerical value to each content type (e.g., Refresh = 1 unit) to track weekly output against the contract.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
      - [**Target:** 80–90 units/week for a balanced workload.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** The "Priority Planning" view schedules content 4 weeks out.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
      - [**PSEO Pages:** A key focus. Production is limited to \~30/week due to the 1-hour research time per page.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
      - [**Editorial Pages:** Require review by Tanmay, who is fast and focuses on accuracy and formatting (e.g., images every 400 words).](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [**PSEO Pages:** Do not require client review; they are generated and published directly.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [**Upcoming Work:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [**Use Cases Project:** A new content initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
          - [**Design:** Awaiting a Webflow mockup from the design team for client approval.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
          - [**Pipeline:** Kirkland (who built the industry page pipeline) is assigned to automate content delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
      - [**TLDR Rollout:** Adding TLDRs to \~600 existing pages. This is blocked by the Webflow bug.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)

### Webflow Automation Bug

  - [**Problem:** The auto-publish pipeline breaks code snippets in articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [**Impact:** This forces manual publishing and blocks the efficient rollout of TLDRs to \~600 pages.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [**Mitigation:** Joe suggested a 50-piece/week limit to allow for manual review and code embedding if the bug persists.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

### Reporting & Client Management

  - [**Reporting Focus:** Weekly reports highlight performance of the latest content initiatives (e.g., industry pages) and overall traffic sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [**Client Input:** Tanmay often provides new keyword ideas, which can change the weekly content plan.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [**Key Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
      - [**LLM Referrals:** A high-interest topic. Traffic from Claude has seen a significant recent surge.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
      - [**TLDR Experiment:** An A/B test is concluding. Early data was positive, leading to the decision to roll out TLDRs site-wide.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
      - [**Performance:** The dashboard is slow and can break with timeframes \>2 months.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Filters:** Exclude "non-growthx" and "batch refresh" content for accurate performance analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)

### Future Strategy

  - [**Current Strategy:** Sufficient content exists for the rest of the year and into early 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)
  - [**Strategic Reset:** A major strategy reset is expected in the new year, driven by the outcome of Airbyte's internal "Sprint."](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
      - [Take over Airbyte account management.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=31.0)
      - [Request Loom videos from Carrie for specific Airtable processes as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
      - [Coordinate with engineering on the Use Cases project (design mockup, pipeline).](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [Follow up on the Webflow bug ticket to enable automated TLDR rollout.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [Prepare a final report on the TLDR A/B experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [**Joe:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Continue content production, prioritizing items marked "approved to start."](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
      - [Collaborate with Erik on the Use Cases project.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
      - [Provide Loom videos for Airtable processes upon request.](https://fathom.video/share/Z1wQSNyUdK13rD6Fjv5Tj-4srXDM6_pv?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
